name: Feishu Open Platform
description: ByteDance Feishus API platform for building chatbots, custom apps and integrations for the Feishu (Lark) suite.

seo.title: Feishu Open Platform — Customer Support SDK / In-app Helpdesk
seo.meta_description: Feishu Open Platform: ByteDance Feishus API platform for building chatbots, custom apps and integrations for the Feishu (Lark) suite.

when_to_use: Custom Feishu chatbot for internal IT support automation
Approval workflow mini-app embedded in Feishu for China ops
Integrating third-party SaaS alerts into Lark via bot API
Building a Feishu app for expense management automation
Syncing project updates from Jira to Feishu group chats

cons: Docs and SDKs still maturing in English
App review process can be opaque
Same code often diverges from Lark international
review.verdict: Powerful if your customers live in Feishu, otherwise Lark or Slack are likely better bets.
review.best_for: Developers building internal tools or bots for Feishu-based Chinese enterprises.
review.not_for: Western-only SaaS teams without Chinese enterprise customers.

lock_in.reason: ByteDance ecosystem, tied to Lark suite

transparency.reason: Freemium tiers but opaque enterprise pricing

developer_experience.reason: Decent SDKs, docs partly in Chinese
